scripts.dev: pnpm --filter server build && node scripts/prepare-native.mjs current --development && pnpm run ensure:electron && electron-vite dev
scripts.package:dir: pnpm run build && node scripts/prepare-native.mjs darwin-arm64 && electron-builder --dir --arm64 --publish never
scripts.package:mac: pnpm run build && node scripts/prepare-native.mjs darwin-arm64 && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --arm64 --publish never
scripts.package:mac:unsigned: pnpm run build && node scripts/prepare-native.mjs darwin-arm64 && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dmg zip --arm64 --publish never -c.mac.identity=null
